<script>
  document.addEventListener( 'DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    var testimonialsSlider = new Splide( '.rtnu-testimonials-slider', {
      type: 'slide',
      perMove: 1,
      arrows: true,
      pagination: false,
      gap: '24px',
      trimSpace: false,
      speed: 600,
      breakpoints: {
        768: {
          arrows: false,
          pagination: true,
          autoHeight: false
        },
      },
    } );

    function classifySlides(newIndex) {
      var slides = document.querySelectorAll('.splide__slide');

      // Remove the 'is-active' class from all slides
      slides.forEach(function (slide) {
        slide.classList.remove('is-active');
      });

      // Add the 'is-active' class to the new slide
      slides[newIndex].classList.add('is-active');

      slides.forEach(function (slide, index) {
        if (index < newIndex) {
          slide.classList.add('passed');
          slide.classList.remove('upcoming');
        } else if (index > newIndex) {
          slide.classList.add('upcoming');
          slide.classList.remove('passed');
        } else {
          slide.classList.remove('passed');
          slide.classList.remove('upcoming');
        }
      });
    }

    testimonialsSlider.on('move', function (newIndex) {
      classifySlides(newIndex);
    });

    testimonialsSlider.on('ready', function () {
      classifySlides(testimonialsSlider.index);

      // Add a click event listener to each slide
      var slides = document.querySelectorAll('.splide__slide');
      slides.forEach(function (slide, index) {
        slide.addEventListener('click', function () {
          testimonialsSlider.go(index);
        });
      });
    });

    testimonialsSlider.mount();
  } );
</script>

	// Function to get the value of a cookie by name
	function getCookie(name) {
	  const value = `; ${document.cookie}`;
	  const parts = value.split(`; ${name}=`);
	  if (parts.length === 2) return parts.pop().split(';').shift();
	}

	// Function to create a new cookie 'awxrt' with the same value as '_awxrt'
	function createNewCookie() {
	  // Get the value of the old cookie
	  const oldCookieValue = getCookie('_axwrt');

	  if (oldCookieValue) {
		const date = new Date();
		date.setTime(date.getTime() + (365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); // Days to milliseconds
		const expires = "expires=" + date.toUTCString();
		document.cookie = `axwrt=${oldCookieValue}; ${expires}; domain=.immieats.com; path=/; SameSite=Lax`;
		clearInterval(cookieCheckInterval);
	  } else {
		console.log("Cookie _awxrt not found.");
	  }
	}
	const cookieCheckInterval = setInterval(createNewCookie, 2000);

<script>
(function() {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        const banner = document.getElementById('site-cookie-banner');
        const btn = document.getElementById('cookie-accept-btn');
        const cookieName = "truevault_polaris_consent"; 
        
        // 1. SMART DOMAIN DETECTION
        // This ensures the cookie is set to .immieats.com regardless of which page you are on.
        let domainSetting = "";
        if (window.location.hostname.includes("immieats.com")) {
            domainSetting = "; domain=.immieats.com";
        }

        // 2. CHECK FOR EXISTING CONSENT
        const hasConsent = document.cookie.split(';').some((item) => item.trim().startsWith(cookieName + '='));

        if (!hasConsent) {
            banner.style.display = 'block';
        }

        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            banner.style.display = 'none';
            const date = new Date();
            date.setTime(date.getTime() + (365*24*60*60*1000));
            
            // 3. SET THE GLOBAL COOKIE
            document.cookie = cookieName + "=true; expires=" + date.toUTCString() + domainSetting + "; path=/; SameSite=Lax";

            // Sync with external scripts
            if (window.polaris && window.polaris.setConsentStatus) {
                try { window.polaris.setConsentStatus('confirmed'); } catch(e) {}
            }
            if (window.Shopify && window.Shopify.customerPrivacy) {
                window.Shopify.customerPrivacy.setTrackingConsent(true, () => {});
            }
        });
    });
})();
</script>
